mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity, selected, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{selected}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id , c.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.main_image AS product_image, p.price, p.unit, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time FROM cart c INNER JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
